overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from sheltered sidewalks under overpasses to neon-lit pedestrian underpasses and open plazas with futuristic architecture, holographic billboards, and wet reflective surfaces.

events.description: emerging from under the concrete overpass into the open rainy street
black sedan drives past on the wet road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk under the overpass, moving toward the open street intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the wet road, headlights reflecting on pavement

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning the street with visible support beams
standard regulatory speed limit sign displaying 40
vertical traffic signal showing red light
rain-soaked concrete pavement with glossy reflections of city lights
large vertical yellow billboard with black arrow graphics and text
curved elevated highway structure with rocky embankment and palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass on a rainy day. The camera moves forward along a wet sidewalk, passing a speed limit sign and traffic light, then emerges into an open intersection where a black sedan drives past on the gleaming wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with elevated highway

events.description: entering covered pedestrian walkway under building structure
navigating around parked vehicles along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge, navigating around parked cars and approaching a covered pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: red sports car parked along the curb with glowing brake lights

entered.detail: dark covered walkway under building overhang with fluorescent lighting
large green metal waste containers lined up on the sidewalk
tall building with large digital advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open street with the elevated highway ramp visible ahead, the camera passes a yellow billboard and approaches a covered walkway. A red sports car is parked along the curb as the scene transitions into a darker, sheltered pedestrian area with green dumpsters.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian underpass with vending machines

events.description: entering dark corridor illuminated by red and purple neon lights
passing rows of illuminated vending machines and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor, passing vending machines and digital billboards while approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: worker in orange safety vest and hard hat standing near vending machine

entered.detail: row of brightly lit vending machines with colorful product displays and neon edges
large glowing digital screens showing animated product advertisements
overhead red fluorescent tube lights casting red glow on the corridor
green painted concrete structural columns lining the walkway
exposed ventilation and utility pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed pedestrian underpass illuminated by red neon ceiling lights and colorful vending machines. The camera moves past concrete pillars and digital advertisement screens, with a worker in a safety vest visible near the machines, creating a distinctly cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza in front of media studio complex

events.description: exiting dark corridor into open plaza with large studio building
crossing illuminated crosswalk with glowing green walk signal
turning right to follow sidewalk along plaza steps

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass, crossing the wet street at an illuminated crosswalk, and walking along the plaza fronting the Kiroshi Studios building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and dark jacket crossing the street toward the camera

entered.detail: large modern building with prominent yellow 'KIROSHI STUDIOS' signage and red architectural accents
large floating holographic billboard displaying animated content above the street
yellow and black striped crosswalk with glowing green 'WALK' text projected on ground
tall palm trees lining the concrete steps of the plaza
wide concrete steps leading up to the studio building entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark corridor, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by the Kiroshi Studios building with its prominent yellow signage and holographic advertisements. The camera crosses an illuminated crosswalk with glowing green walk signals, passing pedestrians with distinctive cyberpunk fashion, and continues along the wet pavement lined with palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, concrete urban underbelly into a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving along a wet sidewalk past traffic signals before emerging into an open intersection where a black sedan glides across the gleaming asphalt. As the camera continues past a yellow billboard and a parked red sports car, the open street narrows and shifts into a darker, sheltered pedestrian area lined with green dumpsters. The scene then descends into a dim, enclosed underpass illuminated by red neon ceiling lights and colorful vending machines, passing concrete pillars and digital screens before finally exiting the corridor. The environment opens wide into a luminous plaza dominated by the Kiroshi Studios building and holographic advertisements, crossing a glowing green crosswalk past cyberpunk pedestrians and palm trees on the rain-slicked pavement.
